title: Starter Game
short_description: Copyable skeleton: a 3-question kids quiz wired to the Arcade SDK.
description: The starter template every OnlyGrins educational game is forked from. Demonstrates the full SDK lifecycle — session, levels, an interlevel ad, and a final score — around a tiny multiple-choice quiz with sample math/science/language questions for ~age 10. Copy this folder with tools/new-game.sh, rename the slug, and replace the questions/art.
controls: Mouse / tap to choose an answer.
